title: CanonicalCitation
description: Canonical form of a legal citation resolved against an authoritative source (e.g. CourtListener). Defined by RFC-001 Evidence JSON v1.0.

raw_citation.description: Citation text as it appeared in the source document, including party names for case citations.

canonical_id.description: Authoritative identifier from the resolution source (e.g. CourtListener opinion ID). Null if not resolved.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction code. v1 values: us-fed, us-scotus, us-state, uk, br.

court_id.description: Resolution-source-specific court identifier (e.g. 'scotus', 'ca9'). Implementation detail; not required for conformance.

resolution_url.description: Canonical URL of the opinion or statute at the resolution source.

resolution_source.description: Name of the service used to resolve the canonical ID (e.g. 'courtlistener', 'cap', 'bailii').
